case_title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KAROL NAVARRETE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,865.30 FILED BY WU, XIAO ZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRETE, KAROL HERNANDEZ, LUIS GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2018 BY RICHARD B. ULMER. PLAINTIFF XIAO ZHEN WU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AIDON NI #301135. DEFENDANT KAROL NAVARETTE AND LUIS GARCIA HERNANDEZ ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
